overview: Advanced longevity clinic using DEXA, VO₂ max, and metabolic testing to build personalized health protocols. Physician-led team coordinates integrated care across weight loss, hormone optimization, and anti-aging treatments.
highlights: In-house body composition and cardiorespiratory diagnostics (DEXA, VO₂ max, RMR)
Physician-supervised medical weight loss with GLP-1/tirzepatide therapy
Med spa, regenerative medicine (PRP, exosome therapy), and IV therapy services
targetAudience: Men and women pursuing data-driven hormone optimization, medical weight loss, and longevity medicine.
